rule: PM Agent MUST run bash tools/run_pm_orchestrator.sh at the start of every session. Exit non-zero blocks sprint work. Honor system is forbidden.

post_agent_cycle.rule: Workers and PM MUST use run_post_agent_cycle.sh — honor-system post_agent_steps forbidden.
post_agent_cycle.worker_example: bash tools/run_post_agent_cycle.sh --issue P1-02 --agent builder --commit $(git rev-parse HEAD) --gate L2_scene_primitives --artifact artifacts/...
post_agent_cycle.pm_example: bash tools/run_post_agent_cycle.sh --issue P1-00 --agent pm --commit $(git rev-parse HEAD) --run-orchestrator --alignment-audit
post_agent_cycle.failed_example: bash tools/run_post_agent_cycle.sh --issue P1-02 --agent builder --outcome failed --failed-check L1_unit_tests

session_steps.description: Skip duplicate webhook events within cooldown
Active phase and sprint config valid
Sprint board schema, deps, required fields
Issue pack matches board — create missing / carry-over
GitHub issue links when require_github_issues enabled
Write Linear sync manifest for human/MCP visibility
MCP + toolchain preflight before worker dispatch
Design data and docs gates green on main (branch-aware ship-code checks)
Compute next agent dispatch, stale, escalations, dispatch packet
Record cycle event handled after orchestrator PASS
Write status dashboard for product owner (artifacts; Telegram on cycle events)
Backfill token usage + regenerate efficiency reports (non-blocking)
Stakeholder alignment snapshot after PM session (non-blocking)

post_agent_steps.description: Enforced cycle close — replaces honor-system individual steps
Inside run_post_agent_cycle — verify pr_merged / ci_green before marking done
Inside run_post_agent_cycle — attach gate evidence + session telemetry rollup
Inside run_post_agent_cycle — PM updates issue status after every agent session
Inside run_post_agent_cycle — stakeholder report + PM webhook (do not call directly)
Inside run_post_agent_cycle — verify factory workflow integration registry parity
PM optional — stakeholder alignment after registry or phase changes
PM optional — re-run dispatch when PM closes own issue in same session

other_agent_session_gate.rule: Architect, Builder, QA, Flow, Release, Visual agents MUST pass session gate before work. Strict role match enforced.
